meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: Animation feels cheap, tacky, or low-quality.
scenarios.orientation: Count simultaneous motion groups (expect 3+ with competing attention). Check easing character (linear or mixed bounces = cheap). Verify holds exist after key beats. Reduce density and unify easing.

scenarios.trigger: Animation looks AI-generated, generic, or soulless.
scenarios.orientation: Check for missing holds (continuous motion without pauses = AI signature). Check uniform durations (all beats same length = no rhythm). Add one distinct timing accent and intentional stillness.

scenarios.trigger: Too much is moving and the viewer doesn't know where to look.
scenarios.orientation: Identify 3+ simultaneous motion groups. Pause all but the primary. Stagger remaining groups. Add holds between groups. Background motion should be below conscious attention threshold.

scenarios.trigger: Animation is visually stuttering or uneven.
scenarios.orientation: Profile frame rate. Check for layout-triggering animated properties. Check for forced synchronous layouts. Switch to compositor-only properties. Test on throttled hardware.
